description: Align the 8 cytochrome c protein sequences in ~/UGENE_Data/cytochrome_c_multispecies.fasta using the MUSCLE algorithm and export the result to ~/UGENE_Data/results/cytc_alignment.sto in Stockholm format. Identify the conserved heme-binding motif using the pattern C..CH and annotate all matches as 'heme_binding_site'. Export the annotations to ~/UGENE_Data/results/cytc_heme_motifs.gff in GFF format. Generate a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/heme_motif_report.txt including sequence names, motif presence, start coordinates, and a brief conclusion on the conservation of the heme-binding site.

metadata.data_source: UniProt Cytochrome c sequences (P99999, P67881, P00048, P00053, P00044, P04657, P00004, P62895)
